attempts.test_code:
import multiprocessing
import pytest
from source import bitcount


def _run(n, result_queue):
    try:
        result_queue.put(bitcount(n))
    except Exception as e:
        result_queue.put(e)


def test_bitcount_127_terminates_and_returns_correct_count():
    q = multiprocessing.Queue()
    p = multiprocessing.Process(target=_run, args=(127, q))
    p.start()
    p.join(timeout=2)

    if p.is_alive():
        p.terminate()
        p.join()
        pytest.fail(
            "bitcount(127) did not terminate within 2 seconds — "
            "XOR bug causes infinite loop instead of clearing the lowest set bit"
        )

    result = q.get()
    assert result == 7, (
        f"bitcount(127) returned {result!r}, expected 7 — "
        "127 is 0b1111111 which has exactly 7 set bits"
    )
